# require_eunomia { #cdmconnector.require_eunomia }

```python
require_eunomia(dataset_name='GiBleed', cdm_version='5.3', path=None)
```

Ensure the Eunomia dataset is available; download if needed.

Sets EUNOMIA_DATA_FOLDER to a temp directory if unset. Creates the folder
if it does not exist. Downloads the dataset if not present (matches R
requireEunomia / eunomiaDir behavior).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type                | Description                                                  | Default     |
|--------------|---------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|-------------|
| dataset_name | str                 | One of example_datasets() (default "GiBleed").               | `'GiBleed'` |
| cdm_version  | str                 | "5.3" or "5.4" (default "5.3").                              | `'5.3'`     |
| path         | str or Path or None | Override data folder (default: use EUNOMIA_DATA_FOLDER env). | `None`      |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type   | Description              |
|--------|--------|--------------------------|
|        | str    | Path to the data folder. |
